allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/Data/produtos.json'\); const promo = p.filter\(x => x.promocao\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(promo.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/Data/produtos.json'\); console.log\('Total:', p.length\); console.log\('Sample 100ml IDs and names:'\); p.filter\(x=>x.id.endsWith\('-100'\)\).slice\(0,20\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id, '|', x.nome\)\)")
